benefits.description: Hunger calmed by day 3 on first Tirzepatide/Carnitine course from Magnum Compounding Pharmacy
Lost 3 pounds in first month eating in a caloric deficit; gained 2 pounds during 1-month break without medication

side_effects.description: Still experiencing hunger/food noise after first injection on new course (Hallandale); hunger persisted initially

protocol_notes: Previously on Ozempic, then switched to Tirzepatide with Carnitine from Magnum Compounding Pharmacy for first course. Took a 1-month break, then restarted with Tirzepatide from Hallandale pharmacy. Reports eating in a caloric deficit during first course.
